text: I know that everybody says "I'D SAY HE'S HOT ON OUR TAILS" was the first YTP, but just hear me out: While I.S.H.H.O.O.T. definitely predates every other Poop, in that it was originally uploaded in 2004, before YouTube existed, this Poop; Sonic and Robotnik's sodomy hour! was the first one to be uploaded to YouTube; before even ISHHOOT. S.a.R.s.h.!. was first uploaded on April 1st, 2006, before any other YTP, once again including ISHHOOT which was uploaded on November 27th, 2006. So, technically speaking, while I'D SAY HE'S HOT ON OUR TAILS was the first Poop ever, SaRsh! was the first YouTube Poop ever.

text:
／人◕‿‿◕人＼
The thing you've gotta realize is, none of this is particularly important. Ytp is taken just a little too seriously by some. But since we're on the subject, Hot on our Tail was the first video to be specifically labeled as a "Poop", which in a sense makes it the first. There were videos like this even predating Youtube that would now fall under the modern definition of a Poop.
